parameters.jsCode:
const services = [
  'ChatGPT',
  'Claude',
  'Gemini',
  'Cursor',
  'Midjourney',
  'ElevenLabs',
  'Perplexity',
  'Runway',
  'HeyGen',
  'Mistral',
  'Replit',
  'n8n',
];

const sources = [
  { service: 'ChatGPT', source: 'official_pricing', url: 'https://chatgpt.com/pricing' },
  { service: 'Claude', source: 'official_pricing', url: 'https://www.anthropic.com/pricing' },
  { service: 'AppSumo', source: 'deal_marketplace', url: 'https://appsumo.com/search/?q=AI' },
  { service: 'StackSocial', source: 'deal_marketplace', url: 'https://www.stacksocial.com/search?query=ai' },
  { service: 'Reddit ChatGPT', source: 'community_json', url: 'https://www.reddit.com/r/ChatGPT.json' },
  { service: 'Product Hunt', source: 'rss', url: 'https://www.producthunt.com/feed' },
];

return sources.map((item) => ({
  json: {
    ...item,
    services,
    current_date: new Date().toISOString(),
    prev_report: '',
    mode: $env.DEALS_MONITOR_MODE || 'MODE_A',
  },
}));
